# BetStreaks

> BetStreaks is a research tool for tracking NBA, WNBA, and MLB player stat streaks, hit rates, recent performance splits, and daily game slates. It is not a sportsbook and does not accept wagers.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Daily command center with hot streaks, today's slate, and best plays.
- [Today's Slate](/today): All games scheduled for today across active sports.
- [Streaks](/streaks): Active player stat streaks for the current slate.
- [Best Bets](/best-bets): Top scored player props for the day.
- [Cheatsheets Hub](/cheatsheets): Curated cheatsheets for value, streaks, matchups, and best bets.
- [Value Cheatsheet](/cheatsheets/value): Player props with the strongest market-implied edge.
- [Hot Streaks Cheatsheet](/cheatsheets/hot-streaks): Players on active over/under streaks.
- [Matchup Cheatsheet](/cheatsheets/matchups): Favorable opponent matchups by stat.
- [AI Bet Builder](/ai-builder): Generates research-grade slip ideas validated against live sportsbook lines.
- [Bet Analyzer](/analyzer): Analyzes a user-supplied slip leg-by-leg.
- [Research Hub](/research): Player and game research pages.
- [Premium](/premium): Plans, pricing, and Playoff Pass.

## Optional

- [Terms of Service](/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
- [Responsible Gambling](/responsible-gambling)
